extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity: I counted only the Against Company, Against Directors and Against Subsidiaries rows. Criminal proceedings counted are 4 against the Company plus 8 against Directors plus nil against Subsidiaries = 12; statutory/regulatory proceedings counted are 13 against the Company plus 5 against Directors plus nil against Subsidiaries = 18; tax proceedings counted only for the Company and Subsidiaries are 25 + 11 = 36, excluding the 1 tax proceeding against Directors and all By rows. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is ₹411.69 million + ₹638.23 million = ₹1,049.92 million, or ₹104.992 crore; the contingent-liabilities table is stated in ₹ million as of December 31, 2021 and, absent a stated total row, its disclosed components of ₹344.92 million, ₹622.58 million and ₹1.12 million sum to ₹968.62 million, or ₹96.862 crore. The company-wide top-five customer concentration is 42.66% of revenue from contracts with customers in Fiscal 2021, which is revenue from operations/contract revenue rather than total income; no company-wide top-ten percentage is disclosed. The source unit is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (1 crore = ₹10 million).
